full_text:
Wei Yue 魏越
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Yue (魏越). General of Lü Bu who took part in repeated attacks that ultimately led to Zhang Yan’s defeat. Wei Yue was affiliated with Lu Bu.
